component.description: A list of components used in the container recipe, including their ARNs and parameters.

container_type.description: The type of container, such as Docker, used in the recipe.

date_created.description: The date when the container recipe was created.

description.description: A brief description of the container recipe.

dockerfile_template_data.description: The Dockerfile template used in the container recipe.

encrypted.description: Indicates whether the container image is encrypted.

id.description: The unique identifier of the container recipe.

instance_configuration.description: The configuration for the instance used to build the container image, including block device mappings and base image.

kms_key_id.description: The KMS key ID used for encrypting the container image.

name.description: The name of the container recipe.

owner.description: The owner of the container recipe.

parent_image.description: The parent image used as the base for the container recipe.

platform.description: The platform for which the container recipe is intended, such as Linux or Windows.

tags.description: A map of tags associated with the container recipe.

target_repository.description: The target repository where the container image will be stored, including the repository name and service.

version.description: The version number of the container recipe.

working_directory.description: The working directory used during the image build process.
